name: native
description: Sutra Native v1.2.2 — runtime-active founder workflow engine for Claude Code. v1.2.2 (2026-05-04) hotfix: ship missing dist/src/persistence/atomic-write.{js,js.map,d.ts.map} files that were omitted from the v1.2.1 commit (only atomic-write.d.ts was tracked, runtime crashed on user-kit.js import). + v1.2.1 closes the host-LLM dispatch wire: LiteExecutor's invoke_host_llm action now dispatches via hostLLMActivity (claude --bare / codex exec subprocess) so workflows do real work post-approval. Pre-v1.2.1 every action was a no-op stub — workflows reported success in <1ms but produced zero side effect. CLI run path wires on_host_llm_result and surfaces step output; daemon-routed (NativeEngine) callback wiring deferred to v1.3 (DIRECTIVE 1777845414 codex-converged scope). Closes 5-source version drift (package.json + plugin.json + marketplace.json + src/cli/VERSION + src/index/NATIVE_VERSION all = 1.2.1) caught by version-sync contract test. + v1.1.3 (2026-05-03) fixes host detection: CLAUDECODE='1' is now the primary signal for host_kind='claude-code' (Claude Code v2.x does not export CLAUDE_SESSION_ID to Bash tool calls; legacy var kept as fallback). Codex CHANGES-REQUIRED → folded. SessionStart hook auto-activates the engine; founder input flows H-Sutra log → HSutraConnector → Router (deterministic + optional LLM fallback) → LiteExecutor (synchronous step_graph runner) → RendererRegistry (8 default terminal renderers) → SUCCESS Execution. Ships compiled dist/ + bin/sutra-native CLI + library exports (@sutra/native main/exports/types) + D3 starter kit (5 Domains, 6 Charters, 10 Workflows including W-onboarding-tour, 5 TriggerSpecs) + SBOM-v1.1.0.txt. 1207 contract+integration tests; 5 codex master reviews folded inline. Intake dependency: install core@sutra first so H-Sutra events land in the JSONL log Native subscribes to. Deferred to v1.2: full Temporal-backed executor (current LiteExecutor is no-Temporal synchronous); advanced operator skills.
